channel.title: Design on naimcinar
channel.description: Recent content in Design on naimcinar

item.title: The new website of CGGSO
item.description:
I created a web site for “Cultural Studies & Gender, Sexuality, and Women’s Studies Graduate Student Organization” at the University of Pittsburgh.

https://cggso.netlify.app Link to heading

I used Hugo as the static website generator. The free Winston Theme was the right choice for the content. The student organziation organizes an annual graduate student conference so they needed a simple and effective conference schedule embedded on the website. After searching for the free and paid alternatives, I found out Time.ly provides all the things we needed in their free plan.
